/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/MemoryAnalysisTool.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/MemoryAnalysisTool.dir/MemoryAnalysisTool_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MemoryAnalysisTool.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MemoryAnalysisTool.dir/src/process/process_monitor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MemoryAnalysisTool.dir/src/sys_io/fs_directory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MemoryAnalysisTool.dir/src/sys_io/fs_reader.cpp.o -o MemoryAnalysisTool  /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1 -lspdlog -lfmt
